data.title: National Mango Board seeking 6 board members for 2027-2029 term to boost mango industry in US.
data.description: Today in Orlando, Florida, the National Mango Board has initiated the selection process for potential candidates to serve on the board, with six (6) positions available for the term 2027-2029. The key focus of the board is to promote and increase the consumption of fresh mangos across the United States.

data.title: Zinzino merges with It Works! for improved distribution in North America and Europe, in all-share deal.
data.description: In Sweden on January 26, 2026, Zinzino announced a merger with the US direct sales company It Works! in an all-share transaction. The agreement was closed on the same day, with Zinzino acquiring the operational assets of It Works! in the US. This merger marks a significant move for Zinzino as it expands its market reach and portfolio.

data.title: Monetary Metals alerts clients about gold lease with AgaBullion in Turkey amid gov't scrutiny.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, in Scottsdale, Arizona, Monetary Metals informed its clients about its gold lease partnership with AgaBullion Kiymetli Madenler A.Ş. in Turkey. The Turkish government officials have been in discussions regarding this agreement.

data.title: AI nutrition app Caloria launched by endocrinologist Dr. Eiriny Eskander offers insights for GLP-1 users, diabetes, PCOS, menopause.
data.description: Dr. Eiriny Eskander, a board-certified endocrinologist, has introduced Caloria to provide expert guidance to individuals navigating the use of GLP-1 medications for conditions such as diabetes, PCOS, and menopause. The service offers insights supported by physicians. The launch of Caloria was announced in Los Angeles on Jan. 26, 2026. This service comes as a response to the increasing number of individuals, amounting to millions, who are utilizing GLP-1 medications for various health concerns.

data.title: Agri Spray Drones and WinField United partner to promote drone-based crop application in US agriculture.
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri on January 26, 2026, Agri Spray Drones (ASD), a top supplier of agricultural spray drone systems, and WinField United, a prominent provider of crop input products and agronomic insights, revealed a fresh co-marketing pact aimed at boosting visibility.

data.title: Clarion Partners invests $2 billion in industrial acquisitions, developing 5.5M sq ft properties globally.
data.description: A prominent real estate investment firm, Clarion Partners, has been actively growing its industrial and logistics presence in the U.S. and Europe. Ranking as the third-largest industrial real estate manager in the U.S., the company has recently completed over $2 billion in gross industrial acquisitions in the past year alone. Additionally, within this timeframe, Clarion commenced the development of around 5.5 million square feet of state-of-the-art, Class A industrial properties. This strategic expansion showcases Clarion's commitment to enhancing its industrial and logistics platform across key markets.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges ONTF, SNDA, ISPO shareholders to act quickly and contact the firm to discuss legal rights.
data.description: Investors are advised to reach out to the company promptly as time to assert their rights might be limited. A legal firm, Halper Sadeh LLC in New York, reported on Jan. 26, 2026, that they are probing various companies for potential infringements of federal securities laws or breaches of conduct.

data.title: Investors in DHIL, UDMY, DXLG urged to contact Halper Sadeh LLC for breach discussion. Time may be limited.
data.description: Investors are advised to reach out to the company promptly, as there may be a restricted window to uphold their rights. In a press release dated January 26, 2026, Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm specializing in investor rights, disclosed that they are probing into various companies for possible infractions of federal securities regulations and/or breaches of legal duties. The investigation aims to ascertain any discrepancies that may have occurred and provide assistance to concerned stakeholders during this period.

data.title: JamLoop appoints Brian Bell as SVP, Head of Sales, amid CTV industry changes. Brings performance ads to streaming TV.
data.description: In Walnut Creek, California on January 26, 2026, JamLoop revealed the acquisition of Brian Bell as the new Senior Vice President and Head of Sales. The tech platform, known for prioritizing connected TV in performance advertising for streaming TV, made this move during a pivotal period for the sector.
